category_sources: source_facts.description says Swagger to AsciiDoc or Markdown converter; official repository https://github.com/Swagger2Markup/swagger2markup says Swagger2Markup converts Swagger JSON or YAML into AsciiDoc or GitHub Flavored Markdown documents.
